description_long: This is a three-seater couch with a sturdy wooden frame and armrests, featuring thick, plush seat and back cushions in a muted taupe or light brown fabric. The cushions are loose and generously filled, providing a soft and inviting appearance, with slight creasing and sagging that suggest comfort and use. The armrests are slim, angular, and made of wood, matching the frame and giving the couch a modern yet slightly rustic look. The back of the couch is fully upholstered in the same fabric as the cushions, with no visible tufting or decorative stitching. The legs are exposed, straight, and made of wood, elevating the couch slightly off the ground. This piece would be well-suited for outdoor patios, urban parks, or communal neighborhood spaces.
description: A three-seater couch with a wooden frame, exposed legs, and loose, plush taupe cushions. The design is modern with angular wooden armrests and a fully upholstered back.
description_view_0: Front view showing three large seat and back cushions, wooden armrests, and the full width of the couch.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the depth of the cushions, the slim wooden armrest, and the exposed wooden leg structure.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the continuous upholstered back and the wooden frame running along the bottom.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, mirroring the armrest and cushion depth seen in view 1.
attribute_cushion_arrangement: Three loose seat cushions and three loose back cushions, all similarly sized and aligned in a single row, with no visible accent or throw pillows.
attribute_upholstery_pattern: Solid color fabric with a slightly textured, matte finish; no visible patterns, tufting, or decorative stitching.
attribute_leg_style: Exposed, straight wooden legs of medium height, integrated into the frame, with a simple rectangular profile.
attribute_armrest_design: Slim, straight wooden armrests at seat height, angular and open with no padding or upholstery.
attribute_backrest_type: Medium-height, loose cushioned backrest divided into three sections, matching the seat cushions in size and fabric, with no tufting or decorative features.
